title: Goldziher/ai-rulez — Complete AI development workflow for 19+ tools
excerpt: Write your rules, context, skills, agents, and commands once in .ai-rulez/ then generate native configs for Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini, Codex and more. 19+ platforms. Written in Go. JSON schema directory present. v4.3.2 (May 2026), MIT.
